allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE" -Filter ".claude" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; npm config get prefix 2>$null)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "claude|anthropic" } | Select-Object Name, FullName; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "claude|anthropic" } | Select-Object Name, FullName)
